report.summary: Researched Ethereum's 2026 upgrade roadmap and DeFi options trading; produced two full learn guides with SEO, structured data, and an interactive P&L calculator component, all added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Ethereum Fusaka (Dec 2025): PeerDAS (EIP-7594) expanded blobs from 6→48/block (8x), block gas limit raised 45M→150M, validator data downloads cut ~85%
Glamsterdam (mid-2026 est.): Headline feature is enshrined proposer-builder separation (ePBS) — removes MEV-Boost relay dependency, decentralizes block production at protocol level
Hegota (late 2026): Named by devs Dec 2025, targets stateless clients and full Danksharding progress
DeFi options on-chain volume surged 10x+ YoY; Derive (formerly Lyra) holds 70%+ market share at $369M+ monthly volume
Key DeFi options protocols: Derive (order book L2), Stryke/Dopex (concentrated LP AMM, Arbitrum), Premia (hybrid AMM, IV-skew pricing), Panoptic (perpetual options on Uniswap v4)
DeFi options vaults (DOVs) yield 5–20% APY from real options premium — not inflationary rewards
DeFi TVL in $130–140B range early 2026; Pendle TVL surged to $8.9B (Aug 2025) as yield-options hybrid

sections.title: Content Created
items: ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap: 2,400-word intermediate guide covering Fusaka, PeerDAS, Glamsterdam (ePBS), Hegota, upgrade timeline table, and impact breakdown for holders/stakers/L2 users

defi-options-trading-guide: 2,700-word intermediate guide covering calls/puts, 4 Greeks, on-chain mechanics, protocol comparison table (Derive/Stryke/Premia/Panoptic), DOV structured products, risks, and DeFi vs Deribit

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap — title tag 57 chars, primary keyword front-loaded, Article + FAQ (6 questions) JSON-LD schema
defi-options-trading-guide — title tag 59 chars, year included for freshness, Article + FAQ (6 questions) JSON-LD schema
Both pages: OG + Twitter card metadata, breadcrumb nav, anchor-linked table of contents
ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap — 5 internal links to existing learn guides
Both slugs added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts

sections.title: Interactive Components
items: OptionsPnLCalculator.tsx — call/put + buy/sell selectors, 4 numeric inputs (strike, premium, price at expiry, contract size), inline SVG P&L chart with green profit / red loss fill areas and yellow break-even marker, result cards for current P&L / break-even / max profit / max loss
Embedded in /learn/defi-options-trading-guide after Calls vs Puts section for contextual relevance
TypeScript check: zero errors in new files
